message:
fix(test): integration_mux_checkpoint_topology validates post-rollback state (ft-olq2e)

The `full_pipeline_mux_checkpoint_topology` test claimed to verify that
rollback restored the original topology, but Phase 5 was derived from
`initial_topo_json` (captured before any mutation), not from the server
registry state after rollback. That assertion is vacuous — it proves JSON
roundtrip of the baseline snapshot, not rollback correctness.

Derive the post-rollback pane id set from `server.registry().snapshot()`
and assert it matches the pre-expansion baseline. Keep the baseline JSON
roundtrip as a secondary serde check.

All 3 tests in the integration harness still pass.
